{
  "contract_version": "phase0_transition_narrative_v1",
  "status": "ok",
  "patient_id": null,
  "encounter_id": null,
  "baseline_verdict": "ready",
  "proposed_disposition": "not_ready",
  "narrative": "Deterministic discharge posture was ready, but note evidence introduced a discharge-critical contradiction: Narrative evidence documents exertional desaturation and dyspnea, which materially conflicts with resting-only stability assumptions. (citations: cit_001). Pending clinician reassessment, the transition posture should be treated as not_ready.",
  "key_points": [
    "Baseline deterministic verdict: ready.",
    "Hidden-risk review status: ok; result: hidden_risk_present.",
    "clinical_stability: Exertional oxygen instability not visible in resting structured data (cit_001).",
    "equipment_and_transport: Required home oxygen or discharge equipment unavailable tonight (cit_002).",
    "home_support_and_services: No confirmed overnight support for high-friction home environment (cit_003, cit_004)."
  ],
  "recommended_actions": [
    {
      "action_id": "action_001",
      "priority": "high",
      "action": "Hold discharge and repeat exertional respiratory stability assessment before disposition.",
      "linked_categories": [
        "clinical_stability"
      ],
      "citation_ids": [
        "cit_001"
      ]
    },
    {
      "action_id": "action_002",
      "priority": "high",
      "action": "Confirm required home equipment and transport logistics are active before discharge.",
      "linked_categories": [
        "equipment_and_transport"
      ],
      "citation_ids": [
        "cit_002"
      ]
    },
    {
      "action_id": "action_003",
      "priority": "high",
      "action": "Confirm overnight support and safe home supervision plan before discharge.",
      "linked_categories": [
        "home_support_and_services"
      ],
      "citation_ids": [
        "cit_003",
        "cit_004"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "citations": [
    {
      "citation_id": "cit_001",
      "source_type": "nursing_note",
      "source_label": "Nursing Note 2026-04-18 20:40",
      "locator": "full note",
      "excerpt": "O2 sat dropped to 82% on room air after approximately 20 feet and 6 stairs. Patient became visibly dyspneic. Patient stated, I do not have oxygen at home tonight and my daughter cannot stay."
    },
    {
      "citation_id": "cit_002",
      "source_type": "case_management_note",
      "source_label": "Case Management Addendum 2026-04-18 20:55",
      "locator": "summary",
      "excerpt": "Confirmed home oxygen delivery delayed until tomorrow morning. Daughter unavailable overnight and no alternate caregiver for first night home."
    },
    {
      "citation_id": "cit_003",
      "source_type": "nursing_note",
      "source_label": "Nursing Note 2026-04-18 20:40",
      "locator": "full note",
      "excerpt": "O2 sat dropped to 82% on room air after approximately 20 feet and 6 stairs. Patient became visibly dyspneic. Patient stated, I do not have oxygen at home tonight and my daughter cannot stay."
    },
    {
      "citation_id": "cit_004",
      "source_type": "case_management_note",
      "source_label": "Case Management Addendum 2026-04-18 20:55",
      "locator": "summary",
      "excerpt": "Confirmed home oxygen delivery delayed until tomorrow morning. Daughter unavailable overnight and no alternate caregiver for first night home."
    }
  ],
  "manual_review_required": false,
  "safety_boundary": "Assistive discharge-transition synthesis only. Final discharge authority remains with the licensed clinical team."
}
